query:
SELECT s.externalId, s.planName, s.locationAddress, s.status, s.monthlyCost,
       sba.billingItemExternalId, sba.assignmentMethod
FROM services s
LEFT JOIN service_billing_assignments sba ON sba.serviceExternalId = s.externalId AND sba.customerExternalId = 'C0038'
WHERE s.customerExternalId = 'C0038'
ORDER BY s.planName;
